planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features and refactoring. Use for generating PRD from initial user queries

architect.description: Expert architect. Use for generating Technical Specification Documents from PRDs generated by the planner

implementer.description: Expert coder. Use for implementing Technical Specification Documents generated by the architect

reviewer.description: Expert code reviewer. Use for reviewing changes done by the implementer

qa-engineer.description: Expert qa engineer. Use for generating test suites for the results of the implementer

debugger.description: Expert debugger. Trigger when test execution fails, stack traces are provided, or runtime errors occur.

documenter.description: Expert documenter. Use for generating documentation for the results of the PRD, TDD, and implementer

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

plan-spec.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features
plan-spec.template:
Create a technical implementation plan for the given feature description. Use @architect, @implmenter, @reviewer, @qa-engineer and @documenter in this order for the following task.

$ARGUMENTS

review.description: Review code changes for correctness, quality, and potential issues
review.template:
Review the following code changes. Identify bugs, code smells, security issues, and improvement opportunities. Be specific and actionable.

$ARGUMENTS

debug.description: Diagnose and fix failing tests, stack traces, or runtime errors
debug.template:
Debug the following issue. Identify the root cause, explain why it occurs, and provide a fix.

$ARGUMENTS

test.description: Generate a test suite for the specified code or feature
test.template:
Generate a comprehensive test suite for the following. Cover happy paths, edge cases, and error conditions.

$ARGUMENTS

document.description: Generate documentation for code, APIs, or features
document.template:
Generate clear, thorough documentation for the following. Include usage examples where appropriate.

$ARGUMENTS
